rules.reason: Internal work can be queued when source, owner, and policy context are known.
rules.allowed_when: Owner is known and the action stays inside the business workflow.
rules.fallback: Ask for missing context or write an approval receipt.

rules.reason: Asking a human is safe when the agent lacks ownership, contact, or confidence context.
rules.allowed_when: Any required context is missing or below the approval threshold.
rules.fallback: Block external work until the answer is supplied.

rules.reason: Receipts are the audit trail for every recommendation, approval gate, or block.
rules.allowed_when: The agent has read context and selected a decision status.
rules.fallback: Do not claim a recommendation without a receipt.

rules.reason: External-facing work can affect customers and must not be triggered from low-trust context.
rules.allowed_when: Verified contact, accountable owner, and explicit outreach approval are present.
rules.fallback: Create an approval task or block if contact is missing.

rules.reason: The agent must not hallucinate accountability when ownership is missing.
The agent must not go outside the trusted context boundary to fill missing customer data.
rules.fallback: Request a verified contact from the human owner.

request_outcomes.safe_next_step: Ask for missing customer contact owner before follow-up
Create finance review task for invoice mismatch
Request a verified contact before customer action
request_outcomes.blocked_action: Do not guess, scrape, or invent contact details
